Just a little color (barely there):
3–4 drops

Natural tan:

7–8 drops
Three times a week

 

Start light. You can always add more next time.
settings.ggKZrkCgfQz_text:
Most self-tanners are loaded with alcohol, fake fragrance, and just DHA.
That’s why they turn you orange and dry your face out.

SerlinoLab is different:

 

No alcohol. Easy on sensitive skin.

 

Double action: DHA + Erythrulose.
DHA gives you color. Erythrulose makes it look like you actually got some sun — not like you lost a bet.

 

Italian carrot extract.
Adds a warm, golden tone. Not pumpkin.

Sodium Hyaluronate + Aloe Vera.
Doesn’t just darken your skin. Helps with dry skin while it works.

 

Bottom line?
A real tan. Healthier-looking skin. No clown face.
settings.ggLuQ0nuQN8_text:

settings.ggNgskm7d42_text:
Step 1: Wash your face with the SerlinoLab cleanser. Clean skin = better, more even color.

Step 2: Put the drops in your palm. Rub evenly over face and neck in circular motions.

Step 3: Give it 15–20 minutes before you put on a shirt.

Wash your hands right after.

Pro tip: Exfoliate 24 hours before for the most even result.
